name: Dipak Golechha
photoCredit: Courtesy Palo Alto Networks, Inc. (editorial use)
bio: Dipak Golechha has served as Chief Financial Officer of Palo Alto Networks since 2020. His compensation follows the same multi-year PSU recognition pattern as the rest of the executive team — the Stock Awards column reports grant-date fair value of one-third of PSUs from each of FY23, FY24, and FY25 in the FY25 row, since their performance metrics were set in FY25.

footnotes: Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under ASC Topic 718. Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of FY25 PSU grants would be $67,920,673.
Non-Equity Incentive reflects the cash bonus paid under the executive cash incentive plan for FY25 performance.
All Other Compensation reflects $720 life insurance premiums and $1,000 in 401(k) plan matching contributions.
Stock Awards reflect grant-date fair value under ASC Topic 718 — an accounting figure, not realized pay.
